steps.title: Add PATCH /api/swarms/:id/fail REST route
steps.description: Add fail_swarm handler that accepts JSON body { reason: string }, calls port.swarm_fail(id, reason), broadcasts WebSocket event swarm_failed. Register route in swarm router.

steps.title: Add hex swarm complete <id> CLI command
steps.description: Add 'complete' subcommand under 'swarm' that sends PATCH /api/swarms/:id to hex-nexus. Print confirmation with swarm name.
steps.verify: hex swarm complete <id> returns success message

steps.title: Add hex swarm fail <id> [reason] CLI command
steps.description: Add 'fail' subcommand under 'swarm' that sends PATCH /api/swarms/:id/fail with reason to hex-nexus. Default reason: 'manually failed'.
steps.verify: hex swarm fail <id> 'stale' returns success message

steps.title: Add MCP tools: hex_hexflo_swarm_complete, hex_hexflo_swarm_fail
steps.description: Register two new MCP tools that delegate to the REST endpoints. swarm_complete takes id, swarm_fail takes id + reason.
steps.verify: MCP tool calls succeed from Claude Code session

steps.title: Add hex swarm cleanup command (dry-run + apply)
steps.description: Add 'cleanup' subcommand that: (1) fetches all active swarms via GET /api/swarms, (2) classifies each as completable (all tasks completed), stale (all tasks pending + older than --stale-hours, default 24), or keep (partial progress), (3) in dry-run mode (default) prints a table of proposed changes, (4) with --apply flag executes the transitions via complete/fail endpoints.
steps.verify: hex swarm cleanup prints table; hex swarm cleanup --apply transitions swarms

steps.title: Run cleanup on current 21 swarms
steps.description: Execute hex swarm cleanup --apply to archive the 21 stale swarms. Verify task list is clean. Keep smoke-test-2 active (partial progress).
steps.verify: hex swarm status shows only smoke-test-2 as active
